## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (consent + host + hub conformance)
- [ ] Touched JS syntax-checked (`node --check <file>`)
- [ ] Docs/tests updated alongside the code
- [ ] For protocol changes: `protocol/PROTOCOL.md` + `protocol/conformance/` updated
- [ ] For consent/security changes: `evaluate()`/`visibleTabIds()` stay pure and unit-tested; safety rationale explained below
